source_name: homepage active data gate and public research catalog review
changes: Added a public-readable active status policy file for the phase-one 300-record gate.
Kept active_count at 15 because no new candidate passed source, status, field, geometry, and dedupe checks in this run.
Preserved the rule that unverified candidates must stay outside active GeoJSON and active homepage statistics.
Prepared the policy file for linking from the public research catalog so researchers can inspect the active gate directly.
quality_notes: No unverified data was added to active data in this batch.
The project still needs 285 verified current active records to reach the first 300-record gate.

Next high-yield sources should prioritize official public works portals, local works bureaus, metro and rail agencies, road excavation/public works maps, environmental review records, and park/airport/port project pages.
next_priority_sources: 公共工程雲端服務網與公共工程委員會公開資料
各縣市政府工務局、建設局、養工處與道路挖掘平台
臺北、新北、桃園、高雄捷運工程主管機關
交通部鐵道局、公路局與港務公司工程頁
環境部環評書件、都市計畫與建管公開資料
科學園區、產業園區、航空城、港灣與機場公開工程資訊
